<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->
- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created. - File created successfully.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements - Requirements provided in user document: Flutter app with Hive, specific screens and navigation.

- [x] Scaffold the Project - Created Flutter project structure with pubspec.yaml, lib/main.dart, screens, models. Implemented all specified screens and navigation.

- [x] Customize the Project - Implemented UI components, Hive integration for data storage, forms for adding transactions, filters, backup/restore functionality.

- [x] Install Required Extensions - No extensions required for Flutter project.

- [ ] Compile the Project - Run `flutter pub get` to install dependencies. Note: Flutter SDK must be installed.

- [ ] Create and Run Task - Create VS Code task for building the project.

- [ ] Launch the Project - Run `flutter run` to launch on connected device or emulator.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete - README.md created with setup instructions.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
